title: Data Center Security Specialist
description: **Description** Amazon Web Services (AWS) provides storage, compute and other solutions to customers, globally. Our customers trust, and expect, us to protect their data with impeccable physical security, continually evolving security practices to mitigate risk. The Data Center (DC) Security Team provides physical security solutions to protect AWS personnel, AWS facilities and information of our customers. As a Security Support Specialist you will be tasked with driving operational security excellence within Data Centers while working with partner teams and leaders. The ideal candidate will manage communications and provide services as required. You will assist with electronic surveillance and access control requests, assisting Data Centre Security Managers streamline efficiency. You will write and implement security process and procedures. Your position will require you to extract metrics and observe improvements by looking at data. The successful candidate must have a proven track record of customer service, possess excellent verbal and written communication skills, and demonstrate good judgment and critical thinking. An ideal candidate for this role will be able to work at all levels, from the theoretical knowledge of physical security principles to the practical application and real\-world implementation of processes and measures. You should have a proven record of accomplishment in operations room/centre dispatching, data centre security operations, physical security, customer service; and the ability to multi\-task. Key job responsibilities Key job responsibilities * You will manage a chat queue, phone communications, generate and/or manage trouble tickets, handle incoming chats, and provide support to customers. * Drive security awareness campaigns aimed at enhancing security vigilance and effectiveness * You will manage workflow ticketing and extraction/development of performance metrics * Configure physical security devices including cameras, readers, and panels. * Support daily operational security across a data centre campus * Distil overarching security strategy into daily tactics to reach management goals AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help. You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion. Key job responsibilities **Responsibilities** * Coordinate day\-to\-day activities and site security operations * Coordinate with operations teams across a number of business units * Provide guidance and leadership across a number of team programs * Building Partnerships through networking and innovation * Extract metrics and seeking improvements by analyzing data and trends in order to influence positive change through targeted proactive incentives. * Verify Data Center security programs are delivered to meet defined global security standards * Assist in all media integrity related programs and activities * Assist in the training of new and existing personnel regards to compliance to security policies and procedures * Handle escalations and resolve tasks delegated and/or assigned to the team * Draft reports and prepare presentations on the status of physical security operations * Collaborate with managers in writing and implementing security policies, processes and procedures based on regional or global security initiatives. * Serve as a customer advocate by identifying security\-related opportunities and crafting innovative solutions that maintain uncompromising security standards * Participate in site audits, inspections. Identifying, discussing and bringing forward issues and solutions to senior team members so to raise the security bar. **About The Team** Diverse Experiences AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying. Why AWS? Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses. Inclusive Team Culture Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness. Mentorship \& Career Growth We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional. Work/Life Balance We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud. **Basic Qualifications** * Experience overseeing security operations and working with security vendors/contractors * 1 to 5 years experience in operations room/centre * Exposure to Physical Security operations. **Preferred Qualifications** * 2\+ years of experience collecting, analyzing, and utilizing data * Basic knowledge of physical security systems and their operation, including access control, intrusion detection and video surveillance Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates. Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner. **Company** \- Amazon Data Services Ireland Limited Job ID: A10422175

title: Digital Brand & Communications Associate
description: **Digital Brand \& Communications Associate — Simply Voice** Get €10,000 of Executive Voice Coaching — In Exchange for less than 10 Hours a Week **Commitment: 10 Hours Per Week \| Duration: 6 Months \| Location: Hybrid/Remote** **⚠️ This is an unpaid internship.** In return you will receive 6 months of executive voice and leadership coaching with Simply Voice — the same coaching we deliver to CEOs at Amazon, Deloitte and Google. **Value: €10,000 plus.** *If you are looking for a paid role this is not the right opportunity for you.* However *,* Simply Voice is a growing business working at the highest corporate level. For the **right candidate** this residency has the potential to lead to a paid role. *This residency is built on a simple belief — that the best partnerships are ones where both sides grow. We will invest in you completely. You can come to every workshop and event that Simply Voice hosts throughout the year totally free of charge. We will coach you to become the most powerful, confident and compelling communicator you have ever been — the kind of speaker who commands any room, online or in person. In return we ask you to bring that same energy and commitment to helping Simply Voice grow — amplifying our voice, building our presence and helping us reach the leaders and organisations who need us most.* *We help you find your voice. You help us share ours.* *That is the Simply Voice Residency.* **We Are Here to Add, Not to Take** At Simply Voice, we believe presence is the ultimate currency. This residency is not a traditional internship — it is a high\-value, value\-for\-value exchange. We work with CEOs, senior leaders and organisations including Amazon, Deloitte, Google and EY across Ireland, the UK and Europe. We are looking for one dedicated individual — whether a hungry graduate, someone with a few years experience, or someone returning to the workforce — who wants to help us grow our digital presence while undergoing a personal transformation that will set them up for life. **A €10,000 Investment in You** This role is unpaid. In return you will receive a 6 month bespoke Executive Voice and Leadership Coaching programme worth €10,000 plus. We will coach you to master your vocal power, command any room and communicate with the calm authority that usually takes decades to build. You will leave this residency sounding — and feeling — completely different. **What You Will Actually Do** This is a digital marketing and brand role. Here is exactly what you will own: **Social Media Management — Day One Priority** * Managing and growing our LinkedIn and Instagram presence daily * Creating and scheduling content using Buffer * Building our Facebook presence and running Facebook ad campaigns * Keeping our social channels active, consistent and premium **Email Marketing** * Setting up and managing our email marketing and mailouts * Building and maintaining our audience list * Writing and scheduling regular email campaigns **SEO \& Google** * Basic SEO work across the Simply Voice website * Managing and optimising our Google My Business profile * Keyword research and implementing improvements **PR \& Media — Desirable But Not Essential** * Pitching Simply Voice to national radio — Newstalk, RTÉ * Targeting business podcasts and press opportunities * Writing press releases and media pitches **Who You Are** You have a background or strong interest in digital marketing, social media, communications or PR. Specifically you are comfortable with: * Instagram, LinkedIn and Facebook — not just using them but growing them * Facebook Ads Manager — you know how to set up and run a campaign * Canva and CapCut for content creation * Email marketing tools — Mailchimp, Flodesk or similar * Basic SEO principles and Google My Business * Buffer or similar scheduling tools **You are also:** * Self directed — you do not need constant hand holding * Organised — you deliver what you say you will deliver * Proactive — you spot opportunities and act on them * Trend aware — you know what is working on social media right now and you love it * Professional — you understand that Simply Voice works at the highest corporate level and everything you produce must reflect that **This is NOT the right role if you:** * Need constant supervision and direction * Are primarily interested in design or creative work * Cannot commit consistently each week * Are looking for a passive portfolio piece **A €10,000 Investment in You** For the right person this is genuinely life changing. Six months of executive voice and presence coaching — the same coaching we deliver to CEOs at Amazon, Deloitte and Google — is yours. You will leave with a voice, a presence and a confidence that will open doors for the rest of your career. **How to Apply** Generic CVs will not be considered. We want to hear your voice before we see your history. We have been flooded with AI generated cover letters. The irony is not lost on us — we are an executive voice coaching company. If you are using ChatGPT to tell us why you want to work with us, you have already missed the point. We are looking for the 1% who still know how to be human. Do not just click a button. Do not send a generic template. Pick up the phone. Send a voice note. Write a letter that is so authentically you that a computer could not have dreamt it up. Tell us: * Why you want to spend 6 months mastering your voice * How you would grow Simply Voice's digital presence from day one * What you would do in the first week to get the June event sold out Email **info@simplyvoice.ie, contact number \+353 876974332** with the subject **"The 2026 Simply Voice Residency"** **For more information \-** https://www.simplyvoice.ie/voiceresidency Closing date: **Friday 20th May 2026 at 5pm**

title: Digital Marketing Executive
description: **Digital Marketing Executive** Join a dynamic marketing team in Beacon Hospital, Sandyford, South Dublin. It's one of Europe's most innovative and technologically advanced private hospitals with over 2,000 staff working together as a team to deliver exceptional patient care. Help us to creatively communicate to patients, GPs, staff and the general public about all the new and innovative healthcare services we have to offer. The Digital Marketing Executive will report to the Marketing Director and will work closely with the Marketing Manager to develop and plan the digital marketing strategy for the hospital to drive online growth and brand awareness. The main objective of their role will be to plan, execute and manage all digital marketing including website content, SEO, SEM, email marketing and social media. The ideal candidate will have a speciality in social media, photography, videography, design, digital data analytics, have strong writing skills and be highly organised. They will also have the opportunity to work on other marketing activities to support the team and will gain experience in all aspects of marketing. **Job Description** * **Strategy Development:** Design and implement comprehensive digital marketing strategies to increase brand awareness, promote services and drive website engagement and traffic. * **Campaign Management:** Plan and execute SEO/SEM, email marketing, social media, and display advertising campaigns. * **Analytics and Reporting:** Monitor, analyse, and report on campaign performance (ROI and KPIs) to optimise results. * ***Content and Social Media*** \- Managing all our social media platforms, generating new content that is relevant, engaging and informative. Driving increased engagement and followers on all our social platforms. * ***Website*** \- ownership of the hospital's main website ensuring that all content is accurate, displayed correctly and up to date. Writing new content and refreshing existing content as well increasing * ***Photography and Videography*** \- taking photos and videos for use in hospital related content across all hospital platforms. * ***Staff Digital Comms*** \- writing content and producing our staff comms update emails. * ***Providing Support \& Assistance*** \- providing support and assistance to the team in relation to Events, Sponsorships, Design \& Print, Advertising Campaigns (Medical and Consumer) and in any other projects which the Department is tasked with. Assisting with the training and support of new junior members of the team. * ***Budget*** \- working closely with the rest of the marketing team to manage the marketing budget to ensure that all marketing activity and purchase orders are within budget. * ***Digital Initiatives*** \- Development and ownership of a new Beacon Hospital health related digital projects. * ***Creativity*** \- bringing new and creative ideas to a team that is always open to trying new and exciting marketing methods. **Skill Set** * Qualification in Digital Marketing * Experienced in social media and digital marketing * Strength at website management and development * Confident in data analytics * Skilled at photography, videography and graphic design * Ability to take ownership of projects and take them to completion * Ability to work off own initiative * Time management and prioritisation should not be a problem * Creative and a real passion for marketing * Strong writing skills and attention to detail * Confident, self\-starter with the ability to engage with people on all levels * Excellent organisational skills and advanced in excel, word and PowerPoint * Experience in using the below tools: **Common Tools used** Canva Constant Contact Meta \& Linkedin Platforms Email Marketing Platforms Adobe Suite WordPress Hootsuite \& Buffer Google Analytics/GA4 This marketing role will give you an incredible opportunity to grow and advance your skillset. You will own all Digital Marketing projects and be involved in supporting other areas of marketing. **Beacon Hospital is expanding, so come join our growing team!**

title: Electrical Colocation Regional Engineer, Colo Regional Engineering
description: **DESCRIPTION** --------------- AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help. You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion. As a Colo Regional Engineer, you will drive Mechanical/Electrical Engineering services, construction and implementation of enterprise data centers, which meet quality and performance levels across the globe. You will work directly with our Design Engineering Stakeholders, Construction, Operations, and Commissioning teams regionally and globally. You will be leading projects to fit out the data centers we support to meet ever\-evolving customer needs as we continue expanding our fleet to hyper\-scale. The Colo Regional Engineer is the engineering representative on behalf of the Data Center Field Engineering Team responsible for the successful delivery of projects. In this role, you will assist in Data Center site selection, planning, development. You will evaluate different mechanical/electrical systems and make a data driven decision about a suitable solution based on our guidelines. Key job responsibilities * Work with colo vendors to review the design for new Data Centers in your region, including design input, submittal review and incorporating AWS products to ensure the design is meeting AWS expectations. * Act as resident engineer during new colo construction projects. Support construction, commissioning, and handover. * Troubleshoot, conduct Root Cause Analysis (RCA) and create Corrective Action (CA) documentation for site/equipment failures. * Directly support operational issues with ad\-hoc training, complex operating procedure reviews, including essential equipment, and event support. * Provide technical support to the design for existing data center upgrades and design\-solutions, which add capacity, improve availability, and increase efficiency. * Supporting operating partners to lead, review, and approve designs for existing co\-location (colo) data center upgrades which improve availability/efficiency. * Interface with operating partners, data center design engineering team, server hardware team, environmental health and safety team to promote standards that maintain consistency and reliability in services delivered by operating partners. * Work on concurrent projects, sometimes in multiple geographical regions. * Initiate and lead engineering site audits within leased or colo data centers. Produce reports outlining risks with recommended mitigations and remediation's. A day in the life Each day you will interact with different teams responsible for all aspects of the data centers. You will prioritize your activities to support data center capacity availability and safety focusing on the actions that are most impactful. You will have the opportunity to work on projects locally and globally. You will be leading projects to fit out the data centers we support to meet ever\-evolving customer needs as we continue expanding our fleet to hyper\-scale About the team We are a collaborative group of engineering professionals dedicated to pushing the boundaries of data center design and implementation. Our team is committed to creating robust, efficient, and scalable infrastructure that supports global technological innovation. We value technical excellence, creative problem\-solving, and a passion for continuous improvement. Why AWS Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses. Work/Life Balance We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve. Inclusive Team Culture Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness. Mentorship and Career Growth We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS** ------------------------ * Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering or a related field * Knowledge of Microsoft Office including Outlook, Word, and Excel * Experience in industrial or commercial engineering in mission critical facilities including but not limited to: data centers, power generation or oil and gas facilities * Experience researching new designs, technologies, and construction methods of data center equipment and facilities * Experience in commissioning **PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS** ---------------------------- * Professional Engineer License * Experience with building codes and regulations for your region * Experience carrying design concepts through exploration, development, and into deployment or mass production * Experience reading, interpreting, and creating construction drawings, specifications, and submittal documents Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates. Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Electrical Designer Coordinator
description: **Summary** We’re seeking an experienced Electrical BIM professional to lead the delivery of electrical models for a major pharmaceutical manufacturing facility. This role is ideal for someone confident in technical ownership and coordination across multiple disciplines, ensuring accuracy, constructability, and compliance throughout the project lifecycle. **Location and Working Pattern** Location: Dublin Working Pattern: \[Remote / Hybrid / On\-site – to be confirmed] **Responsibilities** * Lead the development, management, and governance of electrical BIM models in Revit in line with project BIM Execution Plans, client standards, and industry best practice * Model complex electrical systems including containment, power distribution, equipment layouts, earthing, and lighting for pharmaceutical facilities * Deliver fully coordinated layouts and construction\-ready electrical drawings supporting all project phases * Ensure model accuracy, robustness, audit readiness, and compliance with data management requirements * Coordinate electrical models with mechanical, HVAC, process, architectural, automation, and structural disciplines in a federated BIM environment * Execute and manage clash detection and resolution using Navisworks or similar tools * Interpret electrical schematics, SLDs, layouts, and vendor documentation into accurate BIM outputs * Act as BIM interface for electrical engineering, liaising with teams, vendors, and contractors * Mentor junior BIM modellers, ensuring best practice and promoting workflow improvements **Must\-have Requirements** \[Essential qualifications, BIM/Revit/NAVISWORKS experience – insert details when confirmed] **Nice\-to\-have Skills** \[Any additional tools, sector experience, or certifications – insert details when confirmed] **Apply Now** If you have the experience to lead electrical BIM delivery for complex projects and want to make an impact, get in touch with us today to apply.

title: Electrical Tester
description: **Job Description** **What’s in it for you?** * Work on major commercial, industrial, and Data Centre projects * Join a growing international business with a strong project pipeline * Be part of technically challenging and high\-specification installations * Work alongside experienced commissioning and engineering teams * Opportunity for long\-term progression within a leading M\&E contractor * Exposure to high\-quality systems, testing standards, and digital QA platforms **What You’ll Be Doing** * Carrying out inspection and testing of electrical installations in line with BS7671 and Guidance Note 3 * Completing Initial Verification and Periodic Inspection \& Testing activities * Performing continuity, insulation resistance, polarity, loop impedance, RCD, and functional testing * Identifying faults, defects, and non\-compliant installations during testing phases * Supporting site teams with fault finding and remedial works * Completing Electrical Installation Certificates (EICs) and associated testing documentation * Using digital certification software and QA platforms to record results and documentation * Supporting commissioning and energisation activities across projects * Coordinating witness testing with clients, consultants, and commissioning teams * Ensuring all testing equipment is calibrated and maintained correctly * Following safe isolation and Lock\-Out Tag\-Out (LOTO) procedures at all times * Working closely with Site Managers, Engineers, and Project Teams to support successful handover **Qualifications** **What we’re looking for** * NVQ Level 3 Electrical Installation or equivalent recognised qualification * City \& Guilds 2391 / 2394 \& 2395 Inspection \& Testing qualification essential * 18th Edition Wiring Regulations qualification * Previous experience in electrical testing within commercial, industrial, or M\&E environments * Strong understanding of BS7671 and electrical testing procedures * Excellent fault\-finding and problem\-solving abilities * ECS / CSCS Gold Card * Strong communication and organisational skills * Ability to work independently and across multiple project sites * Full UK / Irish Driving Licence desirable Additional Information Having an inclusive and flexible culture helps the business continue to grow as a strong, dynamic and innovative organisation. As Well As Being Supported And Encouraged To Develop Your Career Here At King And Moffatt, We Also Offer The Following * Competitive salary * Professional Development support * Employee Assistance Program * Health and Wellness programs * Bike to Work scheme At King and Moffatt, we believe in the power of diversity and inclusion to drive innovation, creativity, and success. We are committed to creating a workplace where all employees feel welcomed, valued, and respected regardless of their race, ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age, religion, disability, or any other dimension of diversity. We strive to build a culture that celebrates differences, encourages open dialogue, and promotes equal opportunities for growth and advancement. title: Enterprise Business Development Representative
description: We’re looking to hire an Enterprise Business Development Representative (BDR) who is responsible for generating qualified pipeline for the sales organisation by identifying, engaging, and nurturing potential customers. This role focuses on outbound prospecting, inbound lead qualification, and creating meaningful conversations with key decision‑makers in target accounts. **About Sidetrade** Sidetrade is an AI company, listed on Euronext Growth, on a mission to revolutionize the way enterprises unlock value from their customers leveraging its Order\-to\-Cash Intelligence platform and its Data Lake. We’re proud of our 38 nationalities and these diverse perspectives drive our innovation, one team culture and a customer\-first mindset. Sudetrade is positioned as a **Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ Leader** since 2022\. We value passion over perfection. So, if you’re eager to learn and bring great energy, we want to hear from you. Be you. Grow with us. Curious about Sidetrade? Catch the **Sidetrade Inside Out podcast**. **Requirements** **What you’ll be doing:** * Conduct outbound prospecting through email, phone, social channels, and sequences to target ideal customer profiles (ICPs). * Qualify inbound leads and follow up promptly to assess needs, buying intent, and fit. * Build and manage a healthy pipeline of early‑stage opportunities for Account Executives (AEs) or Regional Sales Managers (RSMs) * Engage prospects to understand their challenges, pain points, and objectives. * Deliver compelling value propositions tailored to the buyer persona (e.g., CTO, CMO, CFO, Operations). * Schedule high‑quality discovery meetings or demos for the sales team. * Partner with AEs/RSMs to develop account strategies and outreach plans. * Provide feedback to Marketing on lead quality, campaign performance, and customer insights. * Maintain strong CRM hygiene with accurate and timely activity tracking. * Achieve monthly and quarterly KPIs, including meetings booked, qualified opportunities created, and outreach activity goals. * Track key metrics such as conversion rates, sales cycle inputs, and pipeline contribution. * Continuously refine messaging and outreach tactics based on performance data. **What you’ll bring**: * 1–3 years of experience in sales, BDR/SDR roles, lead generation, or customer‑facing roles (preferably in SaaS or technology). * Strong written and verbal communication skills. * Tenacity and resilience in handling outbound prospecting. * Curiosity and ability to ask insightful questions. * Familiarity with modern sales tech stacks (Salesforce/HubSpot, Outreach, SalesLoft, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, ZoomInfo, etc.). * Ability to quickly grasp technical products and translate value to prospects. * Organised, self\-motivated, and comfortable working in a KPI‑driven environment. * Experience with outbound prospecting preferred. * Demonstrated ability to meet or exceed activity and pipeline targets. * Bachelor’s degree desirable but not required. * Ability to speak English fluently. **Benefits** * Attractive location\- office based in the heart of Dublin city centre. * Hybrid work model – a flexible mix of in\-office and remote days. * Great culture – active Social Club organizing regular team events and activities. * Health \& wellness – medical coverage, life insurance, and other wellness programs. * Time off – competitive paid holidays plus public holidays. * Career growth \& compensation – competitive salary, equal opportunities, learning \& mentorship programs, and advancement support. Because when you thrive, we all succeed! We’re committed to providing a welcoming and inclusive experience for every candidate. If you need any accommodation during the hiring process, just let us know. **Agencies** We only accept applications from invited agencies via our Workable portal. Unsolicited CVs sent to managers or HR won’t be subject to fees.

title: Experience Coordinator
description: At EPIC, every visitor interaction matters. From the moment guests arrive, our teams create welcoming, engaging and memorable experiences that bring Ireland’s story to life. Through exhibitions, events, genealogy and storytelling, we connect visitors with Ireland’s history, culture and global influence in meaningful ways. We’re looking for an **Experience Coordinator** to be a visible and confident frontline leader across our public\-facing spaces \- supporting Visitor Experience, Retail, Events and the Irish Family History Centre (IFHC). This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast\-paced environment, enjoys leading people on shift, and has a genuine interest in history, emigration, cultural programming and visitor engagement. **About the Role** The Experience Coordinator is a hands\-on frontline leadership role responsible for delivering exceptional visitor experiences during assigned shifts. You will support teams across departments, oversee daily operations, resolve issues in real time, and ensure EPIC’s standards of service, presentation and professionalism are consistently upheld. This is a part\-time position of approximately 20 hours per week, with shifts primarily scheduled across weekends, evenings and peak visitor periods. **What you’ll do** **Shift Leadership \& Visitor Experience** * Act as the lead point of contact during assigned shifts, ensuring smooth day\-to\-day operations * Support Visitor Experience, Retail, Events and IFHC teams across all public\-facing areas * Create a welcoming, engaging and well\-organised visitor environment * Monitor visitor flow and support busy periods, group visits, VIP experiences and public events * Act as a visible floor leader, engaging with visitors and responding to issues in real time * Support opening and closing procedures when required **Team Support \& Coordination** * Provide on\-the\-floor guidance, support and direction to frontline teams * Ensure staffing is coordinated effectively across operational areas * Lead by example on presentation, professionalism and service standards * Support onboarding, training and coaching activities where needed * Foster a positive, collaborative and visitor\-focused culture **Operations, Safety \& Standards** * Respond calmly and professionally to operational challenges, visitor issues or escalations * Liaise with Facilities, Security, Tech and Management teams as required * Ensure all public\-facing spaces are operational, safe and presentation\-ready * Support incident response, reporting and emergency procedures when necessary * Monitor stock levels of operational materials (audio guides, passports, earpieces, etc.) and escalate issues promptly * Ensure Health \& Safety and operational procedures are followed consistently **Commercial Awareness \& Continuous Improvement** * Support commercial goals through confident visitor engagement, ticketing awareness and retail promotion * Assist with operational reporting, handovers and daily updates for management * Identify opportunities to improve processes, visitor flow and service delivery * Support implementation of new initiatives, operational plans and company goals **What you bring** **Experience** * 2\+ years’ experience in a similar visitor\-facing, hospitality, events or cultural coordination role * Previous team leader or shift leadership experience in a fast\-paced operational environment * Experience in museums, tourism, heritage, events or public programming environments is highly desirable **Skills \& Strengths** * Warm, confident communicator with strong people and leadership skills * Calm under pressure with excellent judgement and problem\-solving title: Facilities & Workplace Coordinator
description: We’re looking for a hands‑on **Senior Facilities Coordinator** to support the smooth running of our Dublin 12 office. title: Financial Advisor

As our client base continues to grow, we are now seeking an experienced Wealth Manager to join our advisory team. **The Role** As a Financial Planner at Walfrid Private, you will work exclusively with established, qualified clients, supported by a full in\-house structure that allows you to focus on advice and relationship management, not administration or lead generation. If you are a Financial Planner looking to work with high\-quality clients, backed by a strong support structure and an established brand, Walfrid Private offers a platform where you can focus on what you do best, advising clients. **Your Clients** * Business owners and entrepreneurs * Company directors * High\-net\-worth individuals * Clients with complex personal and business financial planning needs All clients are professionally qualified and pre\-engaged before meeting you. **Support You’ll Receive** * 100% qualified leads provided, generated by our marketing and business development teams \- no cold prospecting or self\-sourcing * Dedicated business development team managing diaries and appointments * Full broker support team handling pre\- and post\-meeting administration (LOA, fact find, data capture, S.o.S etc all completed) * Comprehensive compliance and operational support * Access to an established, growing client base * A collaborative and professional advisory environment **Key Responsibilities** * Advising clients on pensions, investments and protection strategies * Developing bespoke wealth plans aligned with personal and business goals * Providing ongoing reviews and strategic advice as client needs evolve * Staying informed on market, regulatory and product developments * Building trusted, long\-term client relationships **About You** * Experience in a financial advisory or wealth management role in the Irish market * Exposure to advising company directors or HNW clients preferred but all advisory experience will be considered * Strong knowledge of Irish pension, investment and protection products * QFA qualification essential (additional qualifications an advantage) * Professional, client\-focused approach with strong communication skills

title: Fire & Security Apprentice
description: **Launch Your Career with Siemens!** **Fire \& Security Systems Apprentice (SOLAS)** **Location:** Midlands/Munster **Job Type:** Apprenticeship (Full\-time) **Apprenticeship Authority:** SOLAS **Start Date:** Summer 2026 **Duration:** 4 years **Why Siemens?** This isn't just a job, it's a journey. You'll be part of a vibrant early career's community, solving real business challenges, learning from experts, and growing every day. We care about your success, your wellbeing, and your future. Join us at Siemens and kickstart your career in a place where innovation meets inclusion. Whether you're passionate about tech, people, sustainability, or strategy — we've got a role that will challenge and inspire you. **What Will Your Day Look Like?** You'll be based across the Midlands/Munster region, working alongside experienced engineers. This SOLAS\-approved apprenticeship offers structured training, hands\-on experience, and a nationally recognised qualification. Your role will include: * Assisting with the installation of fire alarm, intruder alarm, CCTV, and access control systems. * Supporting testing, commissioning, and fault\-finding activities. * Carrying out routine servicing and preventative maintenance. * Installing cabling, containment, and system components. * Learning to read drawings, schematics, and technical documentation. * Adhering to all health \& safety procedures on\-site. * Maintaining accurate job and service records. * Attending and completing all required SOLAS off\-the\-job training phases. **What We're Looking For** We welcome applicants from all backgrounds; if you're curious, motivated, and ready to learn, we want to hear from you. * Leaving Certificate or equivalent (Maths and English preferred). * Strong interest in electrical, electronic, or security systems. * Practical, hands\-on approach to work. * Good communication and teamwork skills. * Reliable, punctual, and eager to learn. * Comfortable working at heights and on construction sites. * Full Driving License Essential. * Safe Pass and Manual Handling are an advantage but not essential What's In It For You? * Fully supported SOLAS apprenticeship. * On\-the\-job training with experienced technicians. * Nationally recognised qualification. * Long\-term career opportunities in a growing industry. * 26 days paid holiday \+ 5 volunteering days. * Discounts on everyday spending. * Subsidised gym memberships. **What Makes Our Process Different?** **No CV Bias:** We're changing the game. Your CV will need to be attached but won't be seen by the hiring team until the final stage of the recruitment process. We focus on potential, not past experience. **Belonging Transforms** We are fully committed to providing equal opportunities and building an inclusive workplace where a broad range of backgrounds and perspectives thrive. We embrace the many ways people think, learn, and experience the world because we know that diverse minds drive innovation. If your application makes it to the assessment stage of our process, please reach out to the recruiter who has been in contact with you and let us know of any requirements you have. **Ready to Shape the Future?** We receive lots of applications and may close our roles early as a result of this, so we really encourage you to apply as soon as possible. The future is exciting at Siemens, and we'd love you to be part of it. Apply now and start your journey with us!

title: Fitness Coach - New Club Opening

title: Full Stack Developer/Frontend Developer (React .Net Typescript, Azure)
description: **Contract Role – Full Stack Developer/Frontend Developer (React .Net Typescript, Azure) – Dublin/Hybrid – 03 months** We are seeking a skilled **Full Stack Developer/Frontend Developer (React .Net Typescript, Azure)** with a strong background in designing, developing, and deploying scalable web applications using modern technologies. Proficient in .NET for backend development and React with TypeScript **(Candidates must have the legal right to work in Ireland and be currently based in Ireland)** **Role Overview:** * Job Title: **Full Stack Developer/Frontend Developer (React .Net Typescript, Azure)** * Location: **Dublin/Hybrid** * Contract Type: **03 months** * Sector: **Healthcare** . * Top skills: **React important. Hence front\-end role with some back end. React .Net Typescript, Azure Functions** * Experienced Full Stack Engineer with a strong background in designing, developing, and deploying scalable web applications using modern technologies. Proficient in .NET for backend development and React with TypeScript * Versatile and results\-driven Full Stack Engineer with extensive experience in building and maintaining scalable, high\-performance web applications using .NET for backend services and React with TypeScript for dynamic, user\-friendly front\-end development. Demonstrates deep expertise in SQL Server database design, optimization, and integration, ensuring robust data management and retrieval across enterprise\-grade systems. * Proficient in leveraging Microsoft Azure cloud services to architect and deploy secure, resilient, and cost\-effective solutions. Skilled in implementing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines using tools like Azure DevOps, enabling streamlined development workflows, automated testing, and continuous delivery. * Thrives in Agile environments, contributing effectively to sprint planning, daily stand\-ups, and retrospectives. Experienced in using Agile project management tools such as JIRA and Rally to track progress, manage tasks, and collaborate across cross\-functional teams. * Recognized for strong communication and collaboration skills, with a proven ability to work closely with product owners, designers, QA engineers, and fellow developers to deliver high\-quality software that meets business requirements. Adept at translating complex technical concepts into clear, actionable insights for both technical and non\-technical stakeholders. * Committed to clean code practices, continuous learning, and fostering a positive team culture. Passionate about solving challenging problems and delivering impactful solutions that drive user satisfaction and business success. Please feel free to contact myself – Daisy Nguyen (dnguyen@gibbsconsulting.com) at Gibbs Consulting/Atrium UK for a confidential chat to know more details about the role. Please also note: Due to the volume of applications received for positions, it will not be possible to respond to all applications and only applicants who are considered suitable for interview will be contacted.

title: Full Stack Developers
description: **Job: Full Stack Developer** **Location: Dublin, Ireland** **Working arrangement: Hybrid (3 days onsite)** **Type: Permanent** **Salary: 65,000 \- 90,000** We are looking for a talented and dedicated Full Stack Developer to help transform the financial services landscape with our innovative digital solutions. Our customers technology is helping transform a complex banking issue with an easy SAAS based solution. They are committed to enhancing the customer experience through continuous modernization of our infrastructure and operations. #### **As a Full Stack Developer you will do:** * Full Stack Development: Design, develop, and maintain scalable and high\-performance SaaS solutions. * API Development: Create and maintain RESTful APIs and microservices, ensuring seamless integration between front\-end and back\-end systems. * Workflow Automation: Implement and manage business processes using Flowable or similar BPM tools. * SaaS Platform Development: Develop and deploy SaaS solutions, ensuring they are scalable, secure, and reliable. * Code Quality \& Best Practices: Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code, following best practices for coding, testing, and version control. * Collaboration: Work closely with cross\-functional teams including product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver high\-quality products. * Troubleshooting \& Debugging: Identify and resolve technical issues across the full stack, ensuring the smooth functioning of all applications. * Continuous Improvement: Stay up\-to\-date with emerging technologies and frameworks, and continuously improve the development process. We are looking for people with the following background: * Experience: 5\+ years of experience in full stack development, with a strong focus on Angular, Java, and Spring. * Front\-End: Proficient in Angular (latest versions), with a deep understanding of reactive programming, state management, and responsive design. * Back\-End: Strong experience in Java and Spring framework, including Spring Boot, Spring Security, and Spring Data. * BPM Tools: Hands\-on experience with Flowable or similar Business Process Management tools (e.g., Camunda, Activiti). * SaaS: Proven experience in developing and deploying SaaS solutions, with knowledge of cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud. * Experience of design and build based on principles of configuration and low code implementations. * Databases: Experience with both relational (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL (e.g., MongoDB, Cassandra) databases. * APIs: Expertise in designing and consuming RESTful APIs and knowledge of GraphQL is a plus. * Version Control: Proficiency in Git, with experience in collaborative workflows using GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket. * DevOps: Basic understanding of CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker), and infrastructure as code (e.g. Terraform) is a plus. * Cloud Platforms: Experience with cloud\-native architectures and services on AWS. * Microservices: Experience with microservices architecture and container orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes). * Agile Methodologies: Familiarity with Agile/Scrum development processes. * Testing: Experience with automated testing frameworks (e.g., JUnit, Selenium, Jasmine) and test\-driven development (TDD). * Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to articulate complex technical concepts to non\-technical stakeholders. This is an exciting opportunity to join a scaling business with a highly innovative product. The business is well funded but still in a roll the sleeves up and work together type mentality. The career potential for the business is great. If you would be interested please submit your CV now for immediate consideration.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: We are Seeking Full Stack Professionals with strong expertise in MERN Stack. Please Note: NO VISA Sponsorship Role: Full Stack Engineer (MERN Stack) Job Type : Open to Contract Job Location : Dublin Working mode : Hybrid – 3 days to Client's office **Job Description:** * Contribute early to a rapidly evolving field with strong executive backing. * Experience the excitement of a start\-up culture while being backed by a global pioneer in the industry. * Engage in thrilling initiatives like Hackathons and link with the broader MMC Tech ecosystem. * Be part of our strategic tech hub that delivers innovative digital solutions for clients and colleagues alike. * Embrace a fast\-paced, experimental approach with a focus on rapid iteration and a willingness to pivot quickly—adopt a proof\-of\-concept mindset to drive innovation and efficiency. **Experience Required** * Hands on full stack professionals who can deliver end\-to\-end use cases after gathering requirements from senior stakeholders , this isn't a regular coding or development role , requires proactive and problem solvers who can work without supervision and deliver results / outcomes * Strong hands\-on MERN experience and basic AI development with LLM. Their work involves building AI apps using MERN and AI * Must have experience in RAG retrieval, agentic AI and MongoDB which are critical for this role * Proficiency in a modern frontend framework, ideally **React** * Hands\-on experience with NestJS / **NodeJS** or a similar technology stack * Experience with or knowledge of Python * Strong comprehension of **restful APIs** * A creative, problem\-solving mindset that drives your work * Excellent communication skills in both English * Hands on experience of **GitHub Copilot** * Knowledge on **LLM's** * Knowledge of prompt engineering techniques **What makes you stand out:** * Practical experience with Kubernetes and MongoDB * Deployments/ infrastructure **We will count on you to:** * Engage effectively with our counterparts in the Dublin and Cluj AI teams. * Operationalize prototypes developed by the Dublin or local AI teams. * Ensure seamless handover of operationalized prototypes to business technology teams. * Thrive as a collaborate developer in an Agile environment. * Embrace a lifelong learning mindset, continuously seeking opportunities for improvement. * Establish and maintain best practice development frameworks and standards, such as Prompt Engineering. * Develop practices and guidelines to improve consistency and reuse of solutions. Interested aspirants may share their CV / queries to anita.gokul@alphayotta.com

title: Fund Operations - Asset Servicing Administrator
description: * Full Time Permanent position * Hybrid role based in our City Centre offices **What we offer** We have embraced a hybrid working model for most of our positions, which means that you can enjoy a balanced approach of working from home for part of the week and working from the office for the remainder of the week. We offer a comprehensive benefits package including competitive salaries and bonuses, robust Learning and Development support, excellent Defined Contribution pension and comprehensive Wellbeing initiatives and support to name but a few. Further details on our benefits package can be accessed here Benefits (life\-careers.com) At Irish Life, our purpose is to help people build better futures. Our company values shape everything we do and underpin our vision of being the driving force behind Ireland’s financial, physical, and mental well\-being. We believe in doing the right thing—acting with integrity and making fair, responsible decisions. We aim high, setting ambitious goals and constantly find better ways to innovate and improve. Our customers are at the heart of everything we do, and we are dedicated to understanding their needs and exceeding their expectations. We believe that as a team we work best together, in a supportive, collaborative environment where every idea and contribution is valued. **Role Overview** We are looking to appoint an Administrator within the Income \& Corporate Events team. The successful candidate will report to the Manager of the Income \& Corporate Events Team. This team’s primary role is to ensure that all Income is accrued and received for client funds as expected; Corporate Actions entitlements are protected so that Fund values and the trading book of record is updated on a timely basis. Working as part of a small team, you will primarily be responsible for the processing, reflection, and management of all Dividend and Coupon entitlements across global markets for a variety of Fund Managers and client structures. This is an excellent opportunity for the right candidate to gain exposure to an array of varied and diverse Income events across all regions and increase their knowledge and skillset with excellent exposure to various stakeholders within the business. **Team Background** The Income and Corporate Events (ICE) Team sits within BTS in Keyridge. The team has responsibilities including protection of client entitlements around Income and Corporate action events, ensuring clients’ proxy voting intentions are followed through, and managing the control framework around SFTR reporting. **What you will help us to achieve** * Review of daily Dividend Adjustments and notification to relevant teams of associated Fund impacts * Daily substantiation and investigation into income exceptions, cross\-checking with various data sources to ensure correct income reflected. * Regular liaison with external custodians and clients in relation to fund entitlements arising from Income events. * Review and maintenance of Fund tax status and withholding rates across the various client structures, ensuring correct documentation in place with relevant Custodian. * Respond in timely manner to internal Income queries received from Fund Management and other stakeholders including Settlements, Corporate Actions, Reconciliations and Pricing. * Regular review of Risk Management procedures and Regulatory reporting requirements and associated risk to business * Continuous review of day\-to\-day processes to drive efficiencies and innovative solutions. * Ad\-hoc tasks including ensuring Proxy Voting events are reviewed and clients correctly set\-up for voting and daily Stock Lending Collateral Reporting. **What you will need to be successful in the role** * Strong understanding of securities and investment markets, with good knowledge of the regulatory framework and of Keyridge’s business. * Blend of technical ability, sound judgement, commercial awareness, and high numeracy with good IT capabilities. * Excellent problem\-solving and decision\-making skills, with a questioning attitude and ability to recognise, resolve, and appropriately escalate issues. * Strong organisational, planning, and prioritisation skills, with proven ability to work to tight deadlines and see tasks through to completion. * High level of accuracy and attention to detail. * Strong communication, interpersonal, and collaboration skills, with an ability to build and maintain effective working relationships. * Professional, enthusiastic manner with personal drive and energy to perform consistently to a high standard under pressure. * Desire and willingness to challenge and improve practices and processes. * Third\-level business qualification. **About us** Keyridge Asset Management Limited, the investment management company within Irish Life Assurance, part of Great\-West Lifeco (GWL) Group, manages assets of over €150bn. Keyridge provides investment products and solutions to both institutional and retail clients, offering a full range of active and indexed funds together with tailored investment solutions meeting specific clients objectives. The company reserves the right to draw up a shortlist as part of the selection process. Where Agency assistance is required the Irish Life Recruitment Team will engage directly with suppliers. Unsolicited CVs / profiles supplied to Irish Life by Recruitment Agencies will not be accepted for this role. Irish Life is proud to be an Equal Opportunities employer. We have created an environment of inclusion and growth to help people achieve their potential, to ensure they can bring their whole selves to work and to feel valued. We celebrate diversity of thought and perspective and want all of our employees to feel valued, respected and supported. We have built a culture that promotes equality and inclusion for all of our current and future employees and strive to ensure that our behaviours, processes and practices are aligned to this culture. If you require any accommodations during the recruitment process please contact lifecareers@irishlife.ie and we will be delighted to ensure you are fully supported to be your best. Keyridge Asset Management Limited, trading as Irish Life Investment Managers and trading as Setanta Asset Management, supports Equal Opportunity and is authorised and regulated as an investment firm by the Central Bank of Ireland.

title: GP Sentinel Network Co-Ordinator
description: **Title: GP Sentinel Network Co\-Ordinator** **Reporting to:** Medical Director **Base:** Remote **Contract type:** Service Level Agreement **Contract duration:** 12\-month **Hours per week:** One day per week from September 2026, increasing to two days from 1st January 2027 **Closing date:** Sunday 7th June **About The Irish College Of GPs** For an in\-depth insight about the College explore https://www.irishcollegeofgps.ie/ **Equal Opportunities Employer** The Irish College of GPs is an equal opportunities employer. We are committed to ensuring that all job applicants and employees receive equal treatment regardless of gender, civil status, family status, sexual orientation, religion, age, disability, race, membership of the Traveler community, or any other protected characteristic under Irish equality legislation. We are committed to making reasonable accommodations to enable applicants to participate in the job application and interview process. Please email hr@icgp.ieto discuss any accommodations required. **About The Irish Sentinel GP Surveillance Network** The Irish sentinel GP surveillance network is a collaborative project between the Irish College of GPs (the College) the Health Service Executive (HSE)\-Health Protection and Surveillance Centre (HPSC) and the National Virus Reference laboratory (NVRL) funded by the Health Service Executive (HSE). The College via a memorandum of understanding agreement with the HSE gathers data from 100 participating GP practices around the country and provides it to the HSE partners in line with the memorandum agreement. The job of the GP Sentinel Network Co\-Ordinator is a College appointment, reporting to the Medical Director and charged with managing all aspects of the College arm of the project. **Schedule of Services** * Maintenance, communication, education and support of the 100 sentinel sites * Performance monitoring and quality improvement initiatives * Recruitment of new sites when vacancies arise * Liaison with all other relevant parties including the Irish College of GPs, HPSC, NVRL, Healthlink and accredited software vendors * Ensuring the weekly data report is sent to the HPSC on time every week * Ensuring that sites are appropriately coding and swabbing relevant cases * Monitoring of returns/swabbing to validate payments due to GPs * Managing specific projects as they arise – e.g. denominator * Direct line management of administrative support staff **Person Specification** **Qualifications Experience** * Be a GP practice principal * A fully qualified GP with MICGP, current member of the College in good standing. * Be registered with the Irish Medical Council of Ireland on the Specialist Division for General Practice. * Be enrolled on and in compliance with the Irish College of GPs Professional Competence Scheme. * Must currently hold a part\-time clinical appointment in general practice in Ireland, equivalent to at least four sessions per week and you will be required to continue to meet these criteria if appointed. You must also have held such an appointment within the past two years. * Have an interest in computerisation and IT in general, including a working knowledge of digital medical records, disease coding, proficient use of excel and an interest in learning about creating, using and querying databases. * Current participation in the Sentinel GP Network is desirable but not essential. If a successful candidate is not in the network, it is expected that their practice would do so. * Strong leadership, interpersonal and communication skills. **Behavioral Competencies** Please contact Dr Michael Joyce, sentinelnetwork.lead@icgp.iefor any informal enquiries in relation to this role. *Please note that communication in respect of this position will come from our recruitment platform HireHive so please review spam folders and settings to ensure that emails from HireHive will be delivered to your email address.*

title: Golf Trader - EU
description: Working as a Golf Trader at DL Trading, you will: * Manage trading operations \- confirm data feeds are available, ensure trading models launch successfully, diagnose issues and work with the operations team to resolve * Monitor live trading \- monitor prices and trading activity during live sporting events, ensure models have accurate gamestate information, make adjustments as needed * Work with quantitative traders \- share feedback on trading activity, analyze trading performance, take on data\-related projects as needed * Customer service and customer management as needed * Other duties as assigned Skills you will need: * A strong passion for and knowledge of sports, in particular golf, is a huge plus. Ideal candidate would know who Guido Migliozzi is. * Understanding of probabilities and betting odds * Ability to navigate GUI\-based technical tools for trading operations * Schedule will be Thurs\-Sun to cover golf tournaments, with some occasional additional flexibility required * Be a self\-starter and dependable, as you will have some live trading shifts without oversight Bonus points for: * SQL, Python, and / or Linux skills * Experience with sports betting and / or trading in financial markets

title: Graduate / Part-Qualfiied Accountant
description: Downey Osborne is partnering with a well\-established chartered accountancy practice in Co. Meath to appoint a Part Qualified Accountant to join its growing team. With a strong and loyal client base built over more than 30 years, this firm offers excellent exposure across audit, accounts preparation, tax and advisory work within a supportive and collaborative environment. This opportunity will suit an ambitious part qualified accountant looking to continue developing their technical skillset within a progressive practice environment. **Benefits** * Competitive salary and firm bonus scheme * Hybrid working * Study Support * Early finish every Friday * Professional subscriptions fully funded * Free parking and easily accessible office location * Strong work life balance with limited overtime expectations **About You** * Part Qualified ACA, ACCA or CIMA accountant * Minimum 2 years’ experience within an accountancy practice environment * Strong technical accounting knowledge with good attention to detail * Excellent communication and client relationship skills * Strong organisational skills with the ability to manage deadlines * Audit exposure beneficial but not essential **About Your New Role** **Always** * Prepare and review annual financial statements for a varied client portfolio * Assist with management accounts, reconciliations and year\-end processes * Prepare company and personal tax returns along with statutory filings * Liaise directly with clients and support ongoing accounting requirements **Often** * Support year\-end audits and completion of audit\-related assignments * Assist senior team members on advisory and special client projects * Work across a broad range of industries and client types * Prepare journals, balance sheet reconciliations and financial reports **Occasionally** * Assist with process improvements and internal practice projects * Support clients with accounting software and bookkeeping queries * Contribute to ad hoc assignments across the wider practice team **Never** * Be expected to wrestle a badger out of a client’s warehouse during month\-end reporting deadlines * Be expected to explain deferred tax calculations to an angry goose Ref (35041\)

title: Graduate BIM Engineer
description: Winthrop Technologies is a dedicated data centre delivery partner providing turnkey solutions to our clients, headquartered in Dublin and delivering throughout Europe. Winthrop specialises in providing turnkey data centre solutions, providing services from design, through to construction across the full range of civil, structural, architectural, mechanical and electrical services as well as commissioning. As an engineering\-focused organisation. Winthrop has grown to become one of the leading and most trusted companies in our sector. We are currently constructing multiple turnkey data centre projects in **7 different European countries** , equating to over **430MW of IT load in flight** . **Winthrop Graduate Programme:** Building on the success of our comprehensive Graduate Programme introduced in 2022, we offer an opportunity to work on cutting\-edge projects across Ireland and Europe. This enables graduates to gain valuable technical experience during a crucial stage in their careers. Our programme is uniquely designed to develop skilled professionals with a deep understanding of all phases of large\-scale construction projects, providing graduates with exposure to the complete construction process. **Responsibilities:** Your learning journey will span the entire lifecycle of a data centre project, from initial design and building shell construction through to internal fit\-out, commissioning, and final handover. You will gain hands\-on experience in both Construction and Project Management activities including: Jobs * Develop, manage, and coordinate BIM models using Revit, Navisworks, and related platforms * Support multidisciplinary coordination and clash detection processes * Assist in implementing BIM Execution Plans (BEPs) and project BIM standards * Work closely with engineering, design, and construction teams to ensure model accuracy * Extract model data, schedules, and quantities to support project delivery * Contribute to continuous improvement of BIM workflows and digital tools **Requirements** * Bachelor's degree (or higher) in Engineering, Construction Management, Architecture, BIM, or a related discipline * Strong working knowledge of Revit * Familiarity with Navisworks and clash detection workflows * Understanding of BIM standards, workflows, and coordination principles * Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills * Excellent attention to detail and organisational skills * Ability to work collaboratively within multidisciplinary teams * Strong communication skills and a proactive mindset **Benefits** * Structured Graduate Development Programme with mentoring and training * Supportive career development and collaborative team environment within BIM * Exposure to complex, large\-scale projects and advanced BIM workflows * Competitive salary package ***Winthrop Technologies is an equal opportunities employer***

title: Graduate Electrical Engineer
description: **Job Description** Are you an enthusiastic **Graduate Electrical Engineer** ? IPS is hiring! Join our industry\-leading team at our European office based in **Dublin, Ireland** and become part of our enriching Graduate Programme. The Graduate Electrical Engineer will undertake specific tasks on project teams using their education, creativity and expertise to resolve engineering problems and tasks as they are assigned. A pool of knowledge and experience from all of the IPS teams across the world will be available to our graduates and, consequently, more experienced staff will always be available when a graduate engineer needs support. **Job Duties And Responsibilities** * As a graduate Electrical Engineer, you will get the opportunity to work on world class projects for global clients within the Life Sciences sector. * Work with a professional team of top industry experts in the delivery of complex facilities * Participate in engineering design reviews (GMP, safety, operational, maintenance) * Use computer assisted engineering and design software and equipment to prepare engineering and design documents * Research design options and documents findings for Senior Engineer and Line Manager * Research code issues and ask general questions of code officials * Ensure that drawings and designs are in accordance with IPS engineering and design standards * Promote and apply Health and Safety in all aspects of Electrical Design and Construction * Support design computations and quantity estimates for the smaller, less complex projects within the business unit (low voltage systems, fire alarm systems, backup power generation, electrical power distribution, life safety systems, etc.) * Support with calculations using engineering formulas and skills for design such as lighting calculations, power distribution calculations, equipment sizing, etc. * Keep Project Manager informed of workload and any changes in project scope or additional services * Interface with engineers in our global network of offices * Support selecting equipment based on recommendations of Project Designer/Engineer and fills out equipment schedules. * Organise and maintain project files. Maintains a neat and organised work area which allows efficient access to information required by other team members. * Have a can\-do attitude and takes ownership of projects under the supervision of a Senior Electrical Engineer. **Qualifications \& Requirements** * Level 8 Hons Degree in Electrical Services Engineering or Electrical Engineering (preferably a Masters degree). * Proven skills in computer operation for engineering design programs, Revit and computer aided drafting. * Some previous engineering/design experience would be desirable. * Desire to work towards achieving CEng with Engineers Ireland/CIBSE/I Mech E. * Desire to contribute to the development of Electrical Engineering Team within IPS * Good interpersonal skills and demonstrates the ability to work within multi discipline team All interviews are conducted either in person or virtually, with video required. **About Us** IPS, a Berkshire Hathaway Company, is a global leader in developing innovative business solutions for the biotechnology and pharmaceutical industries. Through operational expertise and industry\-leading knowledge, skill, and passion, IPS provides consultancy services, architecture, engineering, project controls, construction management, and compliance services that allow clients to develop and manufacture life\-impacting products. Its newest acquisition, Linesight, specializes in cost, schedule, risk, program, and project management services in various market sectors, including data centers, life sciences, and high\-tech industries. With the addition of Linesight, IPS has over 3,000 professionals in over 45 offices across 17 countries in the Americas, Europe, Asia Pacific, Southeast Asia, Australia, and the Middle East. Specialties Process Architecture, Process Design, Engineering, Construction, Commissioning, Qualification, LEAN Project Delivery, Strategic Master Planning, Energy Conservation Management, Project Controls, Program/Project Management, Operations/Logistics Strategy and Planning, EPCMV and Staffing Services. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment at IPS without regard to race; creed; color; religion; national origin; sex; age; disability; sexual orientation; gender identity or expression; genetic predisposition or carrier status; veteran, marital, or citizenship status; or any other status protected by law. IPS is proud to be an affirmative action and equal opportunity employer. *Attention Search Firms / Third\-Party Recruiters: IPS is not seeking assistance or accepting unsolicited resumes from search firms for employment opportunities with IPS. Regardless of past practice, all resumes submitted by search firms to any employee at IPS via email, the Internet, or directly to hiring managers at IPS in any form without a valid written search agreement in place for a specific position will be deemed the sole property of IPS, and no fee will be paid in the event a candidate is hired by IPS as a result of the referral or through other means.* Connect With Us! If you do not meet the qualifications for this specific role, but would like to submit your resume for general consideration, please click here!

title: Graduate Program
description: **Launch Your Global Career After Graduation** **Teach English in China \| Full\-Time \| Entry\-Level Friendly** Just graduated (or graduating soon) and not ready for a desk job? Want to travel, gain international work experience, and build transferable skills while earning a competitive salary? **English 1** is hiring **recent graduates and early\-career professionals** to teach English in China.
